underlying_goal: Auto-crop white space from 25 scanned photos using ImageMagick, producing cleaned output in separate directories
friction_detail: Initial -fuzz -trim approach failed due to scanner dust; required switching to blur-based bbox detection.
brief_summary: User wanted to auto-crop white margins from 25 scanned photos using ImageMagick with two methods; Claude debugged the trim failure, implemented a blur-based approach, and successfully processed all images.
